description_long: This bistro is a charming, Parisian-style establishment set within a small plaza, surrounded by two- and three-story buildings with classic mansard roofs and pastel facades. The main bistro building is painted a soft lavender with green shutters and features a prominent sign above the entrance, as well as large windows that invite patrons inside. Outdoor seating is arranged on a patterned stone terrace, shaded by umbrellas and bordered by trees and decorative string lights. A central stone fountain and several benches add to the inviting atmosphere, while festive bunting stretches between the buildings, enhancing the lively ambiance. The surrounding structures are rendered in muted creams and grays, with subtle architectural details such as cornices, window boxes, and wrought-iron railings. The entire scene is enclosed by a low stone wall, creating a cozy, self-contained urban vignette.
description: A picturesque Parisian bistro with lavender walls, green shutters, outdoor seating, and festive decorations, set in a lively plaza with a fountain and surrounding classic buildings.
description_view_0: The front of the bistro features lavender walls, green shutters, a prominent sign, and visible outdoor seating with umbrellas and festive bunting.
description_view_1: This view highlights the patterned stone terrace, central fountain, and the cream-colored side of the taller building, with more outdoor seating visible.
description_view_2: The rear of the scene shows the backs of the buildings, additional trees, benches, and the continuation of the patterned terrace, with less focus on the bistro entrance.
description_view_3: A side angle reveals the bistro's lavender side wall, more bunting, and the architectural details of the adjacent buildings, with the terrace and seating partially visible.
